transcript: Speaker A: Jab tak kisi se English mein baat nahi karenge, tab tak achhi English speaking nahi kar payenge. Par har samay to koi aapke sath practice karne ke liye ready hoga nahi. Aur dusron ke samne galat English bolne ka dar bhi to rehta hai. Isliye ek AI dost ko call karein aur jitna man kare utni baat karein. SpeakX app par aapko aise bahut saare AI dost mil jayenge. Jiski profile achhi lage use select kariye aur jitna man kare utni baat karein. Wo aapse baatein karte nahi thakegi bhi nahi aur uske samne galti karne se bhi koi sharm nahi. Aakhir wo to ek AI hai na? SpeakX app download karke AI dost ke sath practice karenge to bahut jaldi hi English speaking mein fluent ho jayenge. [Speaker A: Unless you speak in English with someone, you won't speak well. But no one is always ready to practice with you, and there's fear of speaking wrong English in front of others. So, call an AI friend on SpeakX app and talk as much as you want without any shame of making mistakes. Download SpeakX to become fluent quickly.]
on_screen_text: Jab tak kisi se English mein... [Until you speak in English...] Par har samay... [But all the time...] Aur dusron ke samne galat English... [And fear of speaking wrong English in front of others...] Isliye Ek AI dost ko call karein... [So call an AI friend...] SpeakX app par... [On SpeakX app...] select kariye aur... [select and talk...] SpeakX app download karke... [Download SpeakX app to practice and become fluent...]
summary: The ad addresses the fear of making mistakes when speaking English with others. It promotes the SpeakX app's AI companion feature, allowing users to practice speaking without judgment. The CTA encourages downloading the app to achieve fluency.
